data.title: Fix run-overlay-retrospective.sh default output path to docs/findings/
data.description:
Change the default OUTPUT path in plugins/dso/scripts/run-overlay-retrospective.sh from plugins/dso/docs/overlay-calibration-baselines.md to docs/findings/overlay-calibration-baselines.md. Update help text and any comments referencing the old path.

Acceptance criteria:
- plugins/dso/scripts/run-overlay-retrospective.sh default output is ${REPO_ROOT}/docs/findings/overlay-calibration-baselines.md
- No reference to plugins/dso/docs/ remains in the script
- Help text (-h/--help) shows the corrected default path
- Test from T2 (df5f-8809) passes GREEN after this change
- grep for 'plugins/dso/docs' in run-overlay-retrospective.sh returns zero matches

testing_mode: GREEN
parent: c73a-1918
depends_on: df5f-8809
